description: Single source of truth for install.sh and install.ps1. Both installers parse this file at startup so flags, exit codes, env-var names, default endpoints and spec-step IDs cannot drift between Bash and PowerShell. Conforms to spec/14-update/01-generic-installer-behavior.md. See scripts/check-installer-contract.mjs for drift detection.

repo.rationale: Both installers MUST default to the same canonical repo. Drift between install.sh and install.ps1 here was the bug that motivated this contract.

installerUrl.purpose: Override the URL self-detection used to derive the version when the script is piped from a release page.

3.name: bad_version_arg
3.description: --version / -Version did not match the semver regex or 'latest'.

4.name: missing_artifact
4.description: Strict mode: the requested release exists but the asset (zip) is not attached.

5.name: network_or_tooling
5.description: API unreachable, curl/Invoke-WebRequest failed, or required tooling missing.

6.name: invalid_archive
6.description: Checksum mismatch, corrupt zip/tar, or unzip failure.

9.name: uncaught_crash
9.description: Uncaught exception in the installer — full crash log written to %TEMP%/MARCO-installer-crash.log and printed to stderr before exit.

dryRun.description: Resolve the plan, print it, exit 0 without installing.

enableSiblingDiscovery.description: Force-enable sibling-repo probing (overrides config; ignored in strict mode per §4 rule 6).

specSteps.AC-1: Strict mode (URL-pinned or explicit semver --version) installs that exact version. No fallback.
specSteps.AC-2: Discovery mode + zero releases → main-branch tarball fallback (exit 0).
specSteps.AC-3: Sibling-repo discovery is opt-in, runs only in discovery mode, parallel HEAD probes capped by depth, parallelism, and 5s wall-clock.
specSteps.AC-4: Sibling discovery NEVER runs in strict mode regardless of config.
specSteps.AC-5: --dry-run prints the resolved plan and exits 0 without installing.
specSteps.AC-6: Strict-mode missing release asset → exit 4 with version + URL + hint.
specSteps.AC-7: Bad --version → exit 3 with version regex hint.
specSteps.AC-8: Network/API failure in discovery mode → exit 5 (never silent fallthrough).
specSteps.AC-21: Checksum verification: download checksums.txt, verify SHA-256 of zip before extraction.
specSteps.AC-22: Checksum mismatch → exit 6 and abort install.
specSteps.AC-23: Missing checksums.txt → soft warn (back-compat with legacy releases without SHA256SUMS).
specSteps.AC-24: Signature verification (v0.3): when MARCO_MINISIGN_PUBKEY is set AND checksums.txt.minisig is present AND minisign CLI is installed, verify the signature before checksum compare.
specSteps.AC-25: Signature MISMATCH (configured pubkey + present .minisig + tampered file) → exit 6 and abort install.
specSteps.AC-26: Missing pubkey OR missing .minisig OR missing minisign tool → soft-warn and continue (verifier infrastructure is opt-in until release pipeline signs).

signing.rationale: Opt-in v0.3 signature gate. Verifier ships in both installers but stays silent (soft-warn) until release pipeline starts emitting .minisig + operator provisions MARCO_MINISIGN_PUBKEY. See spec §7.1.5.
